name: horarios-ucab
description: Planificador de Horarios UCAB - Aplicación web para planificar horarios académicos de la Universidad Católica Andrés Bello
author: Oscar

scripts.build: echo 'Build not required for CDN-based setup'
scripts.build:vite: echo 'Run npm install && npm run build:vite after Vite migration'
scripts.deploy: npx gh-pages -d . -m 'chore: deploy to GitHub Pages'
scripts.deploy:ci: npx gh-pages -d . -m 'chore: deploy to GitHub Pages' --ci
scripts.test: echo 'No tests configured yet. Consider adding Vitest after Vite migration.'
